title: Unbreakable Enterprise kernel security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 8.
full_text:
[5.15.0-313.189.5.2]
- nfsd: handle get_client_locked() failure in nfsd4_setclientid_confirm() (Jeff Layton)  [Orabug: 38575798]  {CVE-2025-38724}
- crypto: af_alg - Fix incorrect boolean values in af_alg_ctx (Eric Biggers)  [Orabug: 38575792] 
- crypto: af_alg - Disallow concurrent writes in af_alg_sendmsg (Herbert Xu)  [Orabug: 38575792]  {CVE-2025-39964}

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2025-20721.html
https://linux.oracle.com/cve/CVE-2025-38724.html
https://linux.oracle.com/cve/CVE-2025-39964.html
